scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat – Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
implementing_department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, Government of India
description: Health insurance scheme providing cashless treatment coverage for secondary and tertiary care.
benefits: Health cover up to ₹5,00,000 per family per year
eligibility: No restriction on family size or age

steps: Check eligibility at PM-JAY portal or hospital
Verify identity using Aadhaar or ration card
